nodes.name: .cursorrules
nodes.summary: Cursor AI editor rules file defining project conventions and coding guidelines for AI-assisted development in the Res.Publica dashboard repository.

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: Ignore-pattern file for the Understand-Anything analysis tool, excluding build artifacts, dependencies, and generated files from knowledge-graph scanning.

nodes.name: config.json
nodes.summary: Minimal configuration for the Understand-Anything plugin, setting the output language for generated analysis content.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config wiring up TypeScript, React Hooks, and React Refresh rules for linting the dashboard source tree.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses the modern ESLint flat config format (flat array of config objects) rather than the legacy .eslintrc.

nodes.name: BUG8-gesetz-titel-TODO.md
nodes.summary: Developer TODO note documenting a UX bug where the legislation list view shows raw file identifiers instead of human-readable display titles, with the open decision and implementation steps.

nodes.name: world.geojson
nodes.summary: GeoJSON dataset of world country boundaries served as a static asset, used by the MapLibre world map to render political-data choropleths.
nodes.languageNotes: GeoJSON FeatureCollection consumed client-side by MapLibre rather than imported as a module.

nodes.name: useLocalStorage.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook that persists a state value to localStorage, hydrating from storage on mount and writing back on every update.

nodes.name: useLocalStorage
nodes.summary: Generic hook returning a stateful value and setter that transparently syncs with localStorage via JSON serialization, falling back to a default value when no entry exists.

nodes.name: useOffsetPagination.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook providing offset-based pagination state (page, limit, computed offset) with page-setting and reset helpers for paginated API list views.

nodes.name: useOffsetPagination
nodes.summary: Returns an OffsetPagination object that derives the query offset from the current page and limit, exposing setPage and reset callbacks for list-driven data fetching.

nodes.name: index.css
nodes.summary: Global base stylesheet imported by the application entry point, establishing root-level CSS resets and baseline styling for the SPA.

nodes.name: vite-env.d.ts
nodes.summary: TypeScript ambient declaration file referencing Vite client types so that import.meta.env and asset imports are correctly typed across the project.
nodes.languageNotes: Triple-slash directive (/// <reference types="vite/client" />) pulling in Vite's ambient module and env typings.

nodes.name: ConsoleComponents.jsx
nodes.summary: Standalone UI-kit prototype defining reusable themed visualization primitives (sparklines, line/radar charts, KPI tiles, percentile and comparison bars) for the Country Console, exposed as globals on window.
nodes.languageNotes: Non-module prototype: components are assigned to window.X = function rather than exported, relying on global React/useTheme/FONTS/SPACE bindings declared via /* global */ comments.

nodes.name: Sparkline
nodes.summary: SVG sparkline component that maps a numeric series to a polyline with an end dot and optional peak/trough markers, scaling data to the given width and height.

nodes.name: LineChart
nodes.summary: SVG single-series line chart with optional area fill, grid lines, year-axis labels, and vertical event annotations for time-series indicator data.

nodes.name: CompareBar
nodes.summary: Grouped horizontal bar component comparing a country value against regional and world values, normalizing each bar against the group maximum.

nodes.name: CountryConsole.jsx
nodes.summary: Large standalone Country Console prototype assembling indicator formatting helpers and a global ranking view from country statistics, building on the ConsoleComponents UI primitives.
nodes.languageNotes: Prototype JSX relying on globally-bound React/useTheme and helpers (de-DE Intl number formatting) rather than ES module imports.

nodes.name: trendFromValues
nodes.summary: Computes a relative trend ratio from the tail of an indicator's value series, returning null when there is insufficient data.

nodes.name: fmtUsd
nodes.summary: Formats a USD numeric value into a compact human-readable string (billions/millions) using locale-aware number formatting.

nodes.name: fmtPopulation
nodes.summary: Formats a population count into a compact scaled string (millions/thousands) using locale-aware de-DE number formatting.

nodes.name: GlobalView
nodes.summary: Top-level global ranking view component that derives top-5 and bottom-5 country rankings from a ranking list and renders them with themed bars and formatted values.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration registering the React plugin and project-level build/dev-server options for the dashboard SPA.
